creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: pawel
Date: Wed Mar 19 19:15:24 2014
New Revision: 348645
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/348645
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r348645/

Log:
  - Update to version 5.3.0.0
  - Add LICENSE
  
  PR:		ports/187714
  Submitted by:	Radim Kolar <hsn@sanatana.dharma>

Modified:
  head/net-p2p/vuze/Makefile
  head/net-p2p/vuze/distinfo

Modified: head/net-p2p/vuze/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net-p2p/vuze/Makefile	Wed Mar 19 18:52:48 2014	(r348644)
+++ head/net-p2p/vuze/Makefile	Wed Mar 19 19:15:24 2014	(r348645)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	vuze
-PORTVERSION=	5.2.0.0
+PORTVERSION=	5.3.0.0
 CATEGORIES=	net-p2p java
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/azureus/vuze/Vuze_${PORTVERSION:S/.//g}
 DISTNAME=	Vuze_${PORTVERSION:S/.//g}_source
@@ -10,6 +10,8 @@ DISTNAME=	Vuze_${PORTVERSION:S/.//g}_sou
 MAINTAINER=	pawel@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	BitTorrent client written in Java
 
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	${JAVALIBDIR}/log4j.jar:${PORTSDIR}/devel/log4j \
 		${JAVALIBDIR}/commons-cli.jar:${PORTSDIR}/java/jakarta-commons-cli \
 		${JAVALIBDIR}/junit.jar:${PORTSDIR}/java/junit \
@@ -60,8 +62,7 @@ post-patch:
 do-install:
 	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${JAVAJARDIR}
 	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/dist/lib/${JARFILE} ${STAGEDIR}${JAVAJARDIR}
-	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME} \
-		${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin/${PORTNAME}
+	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin
 .for s in 16 32 64
 	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/share/icons/hicolor/${s}x${s}/apps
 	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKDIR}/org/gudy/azureus2/ui/icons/a${s}.png \
@@ -69,4 +70,4 @@ do-install:
 .endfor
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
-.undef MAKE_ARGS
+

Modified: head/net-p2p/vuze/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/net-p2p/vuze/distinfo	Wed Mar 19 18:52:48 2014	(r348644)
+++ head/net-p2p/vuze/distinfo	Wed Mar 19 19:15:24 2014	(r348645)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (Vuze_5200_source.zip) = 399c97df898c94aa0c9d5c72d7beb8df808c6a52944ea2d3fa29540e89c36e46
-SIZE (Vuze_5200_source.zip) = 9934436
+SHA256 (Vuze_5300_source.zip) = 556149f09f48c533a37d80526ac655f0bc067f3a6bf3f3c4483f5273ac74ebc7
+SIZE (Vuze_5300_source.zip) = 10015198
